name: GitHub MCP Server
description: Official GitHub MCP server for repository, issue, pull request, and code workflow access from MCP clients.
tagline: Official GitHub workflow context for MCP clients.
goodFor: Repository and pull request workflows directly from MCP clients
Issue triage and code-context access without leaving the client
Hosted GitHub-native MCP access for development assistants
notFor: Self-hosted GitHub data access without GitHub services

name: Stripe MCP
description: Official Stripe MCP for payments, product, customer, and docs workflows inside supported MCP clients.
tagline: Stripe payment and docs workflows through MCP.
goodFor: Payments and billing workflows inside coding assistants
Stripe docs and API context in MCP-aware clients
Hosted financial operations context without a local server

name: Zapier MCP
description: Official Zapier MCP server for connecting MCP clients to Zapier automation and app actions.
tagline: Zapier automation and app actions via MCP.
goodFor: Hosted access to Zapier actions and app ecosystem
Connecting assistant workflows to operational SaaS tools

name: Notion MCP
description: Official Notion MCP server for searching and using workspace knowledge from compatible MCP clients.
tagline: Workspace knowledge and content retrieval via Notion MCP.
goodFor: Workspace search and retrieval from MCP-aware assistants
Hosted MCP access to internal documentation and notes
notFor: Teams not using Notion as a content system

name: Cloudflare Docs MCP Server
description: Official Cloudflare documentation MCP server for querying product docs from modern MCP clients.
tagline: Cloudflare product docs and guidance via hosted MCP.
goodFor: Cloudflare documentation lookup inside MCP clients
Faster product research for web and infrastructure teams
Hosted docs retrieval without running a local MCP server

name: Linear MCP Server
description: Official Linear MCP server for finding, creating, and updating issues, projects, and related Linear objects from MCP clients.
tagline: Official Linear workflows and issue context via remote MCP.
goodFor: Issue, project, and planning workflows directly inside MCP-aware clients
Hosted access to Linear objects from coding and research assistants
Cross-tool planning with Claude, Cursor, and ChatGPT workflows
notFor: Teams not using Linear for work tracking
